A.missing: SEE not tied to the HAPPEN event as the act itself; no agentive act of looking, just an event and someone seeing something
A.reason: Generic HAPPEN plus SEE; does not render the act of looking as an intentional act.

B.missing: WANT-to-see plus BECAUSE-see-DO frames looking as instrumental to another act; the act of viewing itself as nominal event is not the focus
B.reason: Over-elaborated with want/because; doesn't cleanly name the act of seeing as the thing.

C.missing: adds THINK-about which imports interpretation/opinion not present in this act-of-seeing sense
C.reason: SEE event plus spurious THINK; wrong extra assertion, closer to opinion-sense of view.

D.missing: no agentive looking/directing eyes; just HAPPEN + someone sees something, fits any seeing event
D.reason: Bare event of someone seeing something; generic, misses intentional act of looking.

E.reason: Someone DOES something and thereby SEES it — renders the act of looking/observing as an act.

F.missing: WANT + KNOW recast as investigation/getting-to-know, not the act of seeing itself; bloated
F.reason: Uses body-part instrument but frames it around wanting and coming-to-know, drifting from the act of view.
